navTip.overview: What Ovo is seeing, thinking, and has queued right now
navTip.outputs: What Ovo did and will do for you: reminders / calendar / notes / drafts
navTip.knowledge: Ovo's world model of you (entities + relations + profile)
navTip.process: What Ovo has done + the full causal chain of each inference
navTip.settings: Trust levels / privacy / AI backend / appearance

settingsPanel.title: Settings
settingsPanel.subtitle: Start with what matters: privacy first, then appearance, then developer tools
settingsPanel.devShowAdvancedHint: Reveals “Reasoning”, “Ovo's action log” and “Ovo's self-reflection” — for advanced users debugging Ovo.
settingsPanel.aiIntervalHint: How long after seeing the screen to ask the AI to analyze
settingsPanel.healthHint: Periodically verify screenshot / OCR / AI backend are working
settingsPanel.backendHint: Claude Code / OpenClaw / Hermes run via local commands (fully offline); Direct API uses the cloud (screen summaries go to the cloud LLM).
settingsPanel.backendSwitchConfirm:
Switch to “{{label}}”?

This takes effect on Ovo's next thought.
settingsPanel.backendLabelApi: Direct API (cloud call - screen summaries sent to the LLM vendor)
settingsPanel.ttsWarn: When enabled, suggestion text is sent to the Microsoft Edge TTS online service (including OCR excerpts). Keep off if handling sensitive content.
settingsPanel.toastHint: How much the corner suggestion cards pop up. The console always shows everything; this only controls pop-up alerts.
settingsPanel.toastHintSilent: Never pops; all suggestions go to the console
settingsPanel.toastHintAlerts: Only risk alerts and actions needing confirmation pop
settingsPanel.toastHintAll: All suggestions pop to the screen corner

overview.draftsSubtitle: No evidence to auto-run → waiting for your OK
